requirement_topic.en: Local Authorised Importer — Peruvian RUC Registration and Spanish Labelling
requirement_topic.zh: 本地授权进口商——秘鲁RUC注册及西班牙语标签
requirement_topic.zht: 本地授權進口商——秘魯RUC登記及西班牙語標籤

summary.en: Importing electronic and wireless devices into Peru for sale requires a local authorised importer entity holding a valid Peruvian RUC (Registro Único de Contribuyentes — the Peruvian tax registration number administered by SUNAT, the Superintendencia Nacional de Aduanas y de Administración Tributaria). The importing entity must be registered as a legal person or natural person with commercial activity in Peru. For the MTC homologación process, the applicant is typically the Peruvian importer or an authorised local representative acting on behalf of the foreign manufacturer. Product labelling must be in Spanish, including: brand, model, technical specifications, MTC homologación certificate number, country of origin, and contact details of the Peruvian importer. The Peru–China FTA (TLC, in force since 2010) reduces import tariffs for electronics from China but does not alter the importer registration, RUC, or Spanish labelling requirements.
summary.zh: 将电子及无线设备进口至秘鲁销售，须有持有效秘鲁RUC（纳税人唯一登记号，由SUNAT即国家海关和税务管理局管理）的本地授权进口商实体。进口实体须在秘鲁注册为从事商业活动的法人或自然人。MTC均质化认证程序中，申请人通常为秘鲁进口商或代表境外制造商的本地授权代理人。产品标签须以西班牙语标注，包括：品牌、型号、技术规格、MTC均质化证书编号、原产国及秘鲁进口商联系方式。秘鲁-中国自贸协定（TLC，自2010年起生效）降低了来自中国的电子产品进口关税，但不改变进口商登记、RUC或西班牙语标签要求。
summary.zht: 將電子及無線裝置進口至秘魯銷售，須有持有效秘魯RUC（納稅人唯一登記號，由SUNAT即國家海關和稅務管理局管理）的本地授權進口商實體。進口實體須在秘魯登記為從事商業活動的法人或自然人。MTC均質化認證程序中，申請人通常為秘魯進口商或代表境外製造商的本地授權代理人。產品標籤須以西班牙語標注，包括：品牌、型號、技術規格、MTC均質化證書編號、原產國及秘魯進口商聯繫方式。秘魯-中國自由貿易協定（TLC，自2010年起生效）降低了來自中國的電子產品進口關稅，但不改變進口商登記、RUC或西班牙語標籤要求。

standards_or_laws: SUNAT RUC (Registro Único de Contribuyentes) — Peruvian tax registration number required for all commercial importers
Ley de Telecomunicaciones DL 702 / TUO — MTC homologación applicant must be the Peruvian importer or authorised local representative
Peruvian consumer labelling regulations — Spanish-language label required including homologación number, brand, model, origin, and importer contact details
TLC Peru–China (Free Trade Agreement, in force 2010) — reduces import tariffs on Chinese electronics; does not waive importer registration or labelling requirements

summary.en: In China, there is no direct equivalent to the Peruvian RUC importer registration requirement for inbound foreign goods. Chinese exporters hold their own MIIT SRRC and NAL approvals and may export directly or through trading companies. However, for goods entering China, a Chinese customs registration (GACC importer registration) is required; similarly, some product categories require a local Chinese authorised representative for regulatory filings. Chinese exporters to Peru must identify and contract a Peruvian RUC-registered importer or establish a local Peruvian entity to act as the homologación applicant and label holder.
summary.zh: 在中国，进口外国商品不存在与秘鲁RUC进口商登记要求直接对等的制度。中国出口商持有自己的MIIT SRRC和NAL批准，可直接出口或通过贸易公司出口。但对于进入中国的商品，须进行中国海关注册（GACC进口商注册）；同样，某些产品类别须有在华本地授权代表进行监管备案。向秘鲁出口的中国出口商须识别并签约持有秘鲁RUC的进口商，或在秘鲁设立本地实体，作为均质化认证申请人和标签持有人。
summary.zht: 在中國，進口外國商品不存在與秘魯RUC進口商登記要求直接對等的制度。中國出口商持有自己的MIIT SRRC和NAL批准，可直接出口或通過貿易公司出口。但對於進入中國的商品，須進行中國海關登記（GACC進口商登記）；同樣，某些產品類別須有在華本地授權代表進行監管備案。向秘魯出口的中國出口商須識別並簽約持有秘魯RUC的進口商，或在秘魯設立本地實體，作為均質化認證申請人和標籤持有人。

standards_or_laws: MIIT SRRC type approval — held by Chinese manufacturer; no Peruvian-side equivalent
GACC (General Administration of Customs China) importer registration — required for goods entering China, analogous in structure to Peru's importer registration requirement
No mandatory local Chinese representative requirement for consumer wireless products exported from China (exporter holds approvals directly)

gap.en: Chinese manufacturers exporting wireless or IoT devices to Peru must engage a Peruvian-registered importer holding a valid RUC before the MTC homologación application can be filed. There is no self-certification or direct manufacturer-to-consumer import pathway for commercial quantities without a registered Peruvian importer. Product labels must be in Spanish and must include the MTC homologación certificate number, brand, model, technical specifications, country of origin, and Peruvian importer contact details. Chinese-language-only labels are not compliant. The Peru–China FTA reduces tariffs but does not affect these requirements.
gap.zh: 向秘鲁出口无线或物联网设备的中国制造商，在提交MTC均质化认证申请之前，必须签约持有有效RUC的秘鲁注册进口商。商业数量的进口不存在无须注册秘鲁进口商的自我认证或制造商直接向消费者进口的路径。产品标签须以西班牙语标注，并须包含MTC均质化证书编号、品牌、型号、技术规格、原产国及秘鲁进口商联系方式。仅有中文标签不符合要求。秘鲁-中国自贸协定可降低关税，但不影响上述要求。
gap.zht: 向秘魯出口無線或物聯網裝置的中國製造商，在提交MTC均質化認證申請之前，必須簽約持有有效RUC的秘魯登記進口商。商業數量的進口不存在無須登記秘魯進口商的自我認證或製造商直接向消費者進口的路徑。產品標籤須以西班牙語標注，並須包含MTC均質化證書編號、品牌、型號、技術規格、原產國及秘魯進口商聯繫方式。僅有中文標籤不符合要求。秘魯-中國自貿協定可降低關稅，但不影響上述要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Peruvian RUC-registered importer required for customs clearance and MTC homologación application; Spanish-language labelling including homologación number mandatory before sale
mandatory_status.cn: Not directly applicable — Chinese exporters hold their own approvals; no equivalent mandatory local-representative requirement for consumer wireless product exports from China

source.publisher: SUNAT — Superintendencia Nacional de Aduanas y de Administración Tributaria (Peru)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese exporters of wireless and IoT devices to Peru must engage a Peruvian importer with a valid RUC before filing an MTC homologación application; there is no direct manufacturer-to-consumer commercial import pathway without a registered Peruvian importer. Product labels must be in Spanish and include the MTC homologación certificate number. The Peru–China FTA reduces import tariffs but does not waive importer registration or labelling obligations. Verify current SUNAT importer registration procedures, MTC homologación applicant requirements, and Peruvian labelling rules with a qualified Peruvian regulatory professional before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 向秘鲁出口无线及物联网设备的中国出口商，在提交MTC均质化认证申请前，须签约持有有效RUC的秘鲁进口商；无须注册秘鲁进口商的商业进口直销路径不存在。产品标签须以西班牙语标注并包含MTC均质化证书编号。秘鲁-中国自贸协定可降低进口关税，但不豁免进口商登记或标签义务。在发货前，请向合格的秘鲁监管专业人士核验当前SUNAT进口商注册程序、MTC均质化认证申请人要求及秘鲁标签规则。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 向秘魯出口無線及物聯網裝置的中國出口商，在提交MTC均質化認證申請前，須簽約持有有效RUC的秘魯進口商；無須登記秘魯進口商的商業進口直銷路徑不存在。產品標籤須以西班牙語標注並包含MTC均質化證書編號。秘魯-中國自貿協定可降低進口關稅，但不豁免進口商登記或標籤義務。在發貨前，請向合格的秘魯監管專業人士核驗當前SUNAT進口商登記程序、MTC均質化認證申請人要求及秘魯標籤規則。
